sources.label: Laser Focus World - VIGO Photonics acquires InfraRed Associates (press release Jun 2, 2026)
Bankier.pl - VIGOPHOTN quote and Q1 2026 summary (revenue -14.3% y/y, backlog +77% y/y to PLN 43.9M; Jun 5 close 584 PLN, -5.5%)
Parkiet - PCO framework agreement (~PLN 192M, Apr 2025) and ESPI Annex No. 1

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6; today's +2.1% merely retraces part of the -5.5% June 5 dip, so the setup is unchanged from yesterday's hold. The pre-cutoff backdrop (backlog +77% y/y, US footprint via InfraRed Associates, PCO defense ramp starting 2026) keeps the photonics/IR-detector leverage thesis intact at a still-uncrowded $140M cap.
verdicts.bull: T2SL cooled IR detector ramp under the ~PLN 192M PCO framework plus the InfraRed Associates acquisition opens US defense/government channels; backlog up 77% y/y signals the Q1 revenue dip was timing, not demand.
verdicts.neutral: Stock at 594 PLN sits just below the 610-670 PLN analyst target band after +26% YTD; much of the defense-photonics rerating is in the price and the next leg needs delivery execution in H2 2026.
verdicts.bear: Q1 2026 revenue fell 14.3% y/y on contract slippage and adjusted net result was negative through 2025; a microcap with lumpy military order timing can disappoint for several quarters before backlog converts.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: First serial T2SL matrix-detector deliveries/production milestones under the PCO framework and initial US order flow from the InfraRed Associates integration in H2 2026.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Further contract-timing slippage turning the 77% backlog growth into deferred rather than realized revenue, compressing the rerated multiple on a thin-liquidity Warsaw microcap.
